title: SpectralIOGovernor
description: Runtime configuration for the DVSM-v3 Spectral I/O Governor

divergence_threshold.description: dH/dt > this (bits/frame) → trigger prefetch. Tune per title.

diffuse_var_threshold.description: |Z_k| variance above this → Diffuse class → lower mip

collapse_threshold.description: mean |Z_k| below this → Collapsed → minimum mip

default_ttl_frames.description: Prefetch jobs expire after this many frames. ~67ms at 240Hz.

bucket_count.description: Entropy quantization buckets. Higher = more fidelity at O(B²) cost.

salience_threshold.description: P(next bucket) > this → enqueue prefetch for mapped asset group.

format_hint.description: Default compression format for prefetch decompression hint.

mip_savings_estimate.description: Estimated bandwidth reduction from Diffuse mip bias. Title-dependent.

claims_policy.description: No bandwidth or FPS claims without FrameVarianceRing.p99() evidence.

genre_presets.description: Per-genre overrides applied via SpectralIOGovernor::apply_genre(). All thresholds are tunable at runtime via GenreGovernor::switch_mode().

fps_competitive.rationale: High divergence threshold ignores flick-shot Z spikes. Low TTL matches fast-paced map reuse. Resolution floor 0.75 preserves pixel sharpness for target identification.

fps_tactical.rationale: Allows frame skips during static scope holds (norm_variance < 0.05). Moderate thresholds for deliberate map traversal pacing.

mmo_open_world.rationale: Low divergence threshold catches zone boundary transitions 8-12 frames early. 32-frame TTL gives streaming system time to load large texture packs. 4x AFMF2 during static camera (map screen, crafting UI) is essentially free.

mmo_instance.rationale: Slightly higher divergence threshold than open world to avoid false triggers from combat VFX entropy bursts. Higher resolution floor (0.60 vs 0.50) because boss encounter details matter during high-attention moments.

afmf2_bridge.description: AFMF2 confidence signal parameters. See integration/afmf2_bridge.rs.

confidence_suppression_range_multiplier.description: How many × divergence_threshold before confidence reaches 0. confidence = 1 - (|dH/dt| - threshold) / (threshold × this).

static_scene_confidence_floor.description: Minimum confidence on stable scenes (norm_variance < 0.02, h_normalized < 0.30). Prevents suppressing AFMF2 on false spikes in completely static scenes.

ghost_frame_invalidates_reference.description: If prior frame had ghost_err > threshold, do not use it as AFMF2 reference. Prevents optical flow from tracking a rebirth discontinuity.
